summary: Iteration 31: 3 Bug Fixes Verified - All tests passed. 1) Upselling API fix (hardcoded email changed from melitobruno@gmail.com to admin@brunomelito.it) - working correctly, returns 2 suggestions with 15% discount. 2) Promos and Card/Abbonamenti visible in Planning page - NewAppointmentDialog fetches all active promos on open and displays Card templates. 3) Services on public booking page grouped by clickable categories using HTML <details> elements.

critical_code_review_comments: Bug Fix 1 (Upselling): Backend public.py line 332 correctly uses admin@brunomelito.it instead of hardcoded melitobruno@gmail.com
Bug Fix 2 (Promos in Planning): NewAppointmentDialog.jsx line 87 fetches all promos on dialog open via api.get(`${API}/promotions`)
Bug Fix 3 (Category Grouping): BookingPage.jsx uses groupServicesByCategory() and <details> HTML elements for collapsible categories
All data-testid attributes present for testing: booking-cat-*, service-item-*, promo-item-*, booking-card-*, planning-card-template-*, allpromo-*
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31 verified 3 bug fixes: 1) Upselling API now uses correct user email (admin@brunomelito.it), 2) NewAppointmentDialog in Planning page fetches and displays all active promos and card templates, 3) Public booking page (/prenota) groups services by clickable categories using HTML <details> elements. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend UI verified via Playwright - categories expand/collapse, services selectable, promos and cards visible.

category_grouping.change: Services grouped by category using <details> HTML elements
